snippet.title: El Secreto de la Sincronizaci√≥n | Veritasium en espa√±ol
snippet.description:
¬øC√≥mo surge el orden espont√°neamente del caos?
üï∞ SUSCR√çBETE para ver todos nuestros videos:
http://bit.ly/Suscribirse_Veritasium_ES
 
Un enorme agradecimiento al profesor Steven Strogatz: este video no habr√≠a sido posible sin √©l. Gran parte del gui√≥n se ha inspirado en su maravilloso libro Sync y en su charla TED de 2004. Es un gigante en este campo, y ha escrito literalmente el libro sobre el caos, la complejidad y la sincronizaci√≥n. Es dif√≠cil encontrar un art√≠culo en este campo en el que Steven (o uno de sus estudiantes) no haya contribuido. Su podcast "The Joy of X" es maravilloso - por favor, esc√∫chalo y suscr√≠bete dondequiera que consigas tus podcasts: https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

El incre√≠ble interactivo de Luci√©rnagas de Nicky Case - https://ncase.me/fireflies

El gran modelo interactivo de Kuramoto - https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle/

Referencias: 

Strogatz, S. H. (2012). Sync: How order emerges from chaos in the universe, nature, and daily life. Hachette UK. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Sync‚Äã

Strogatz, S. H. (2000). From Kuramoto to Crawford: exploring the onset of synchronization in populations of coupled oscillators. Physica D: Nonlinear Phenomena, 143(1-4), 1-20. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Strogatz2000‚Äã

Goldsztein, G. H., Nadeau, A. N., & Strogatz, S. H. (2021). Synchronization of clocks and metronomes: A perturbation analysis based on multiple timescales. Chaos: An Interdisciplinary Journal of Nonlinear Science, 31(2), 023109. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Goldsztein‚Äã

The Broughton Suspension Bridge and the Resonance Disaster ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Broughton‚Äã

Bennett, M., Schatz, M. F., Rockwood, H., & Wiesenfeld, K. (2002). Huygens's clocks. Proceedings of the Royal Society of London. Series A: Mathematical, Physical and Engineering Sciences, 458(2019), 563-579. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Bennett2002‚Äã

Pantaleone, J. (2002). Synchronization of metronomes. American Journal of Physics, 70(10), 992-1000. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Pantaleone2002‚Äã

Kuramoto, Y. (1975). Self-entrainment of a population of coupled non-linear oscillators. In International symposium on mathematical problems in theoretical physics (pp. 420-422). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. -- https://ve42.co/Kuramoto1975‚Äã

Great video by Minute Earth about Tidal Locking and the Moon ‚Äî https://ve42.co/MinuteEarth‚Äã

Strogatz, S. H., Abrams, D. M., McRobie, A., Eckhardt, B., & Ott, E. (2005). Crowd synchrony on the Millennium Bridge. Nature, 438(7064), 43-44. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Strogatz2005‚Äã

Zhabotinsky, A. M. (2007). Belousov-zhabotinsky reaction. Scholarpedia, 2(9), 1435. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Zhabotinsky2007‚Äã

Flavio H Fenton et al. (2008) Cardiac arrhythmia. Scholarpedia, 3(7):1665. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Cardiac‚Äã

Cherry, E. M., & Fenton, F. H. (2008). Visualization of spiral and scroll waves in simulated and experimental cardiac tissue. New Journal of Physics, 10(12), 125016. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Cherry2008‚Äã

Tyson, J. J. (1994). What everyone should know about the Belousov-Zhabotinsky reaction. In Frontiers in mathematical biology (pp. 569-587). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Tyson1994‚Äã

Winfree, A. T. (2001). The geometry of biological time (Vol. 12). Springer Science & Business Media. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Winfree2001

Escrito por Derek Muller y Petr Lebedev
Animaci√≥n de Fabio Albertelli y Jakub Misiek
GFX y animaci√≥n 3D por Jonny Hyman
Filmado por Derek Muller y Raquel Nuno

Animaci√≥n de introducci√≥n por Jorge Cham

Gracias a las im√°genes de BZ de SteinbockGroup: https://youtu.be/IJn1ssZEyns y 
NileRed https://youtu.be/LL3kVtc-4vY

Animaci√≥n de las ondas en el coraz√≥n de The Virtual Heart/ EM Cherry/ FH Fenton - https://ve42.co/Cardiac y https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Materiales qu√≠micos y protocolo proporcionados por Mike Morris y el Programa de Divulgaci√≥n de la Qu√≠mica de la UCI https://www.chem.uci.edu/~jsnowick/outreach/UCI_Outreach/index.html

Gracias a Alie Ward por la consulta de t√≠tulos y miniaturas
Gracias a la Dra. Juliette Becker y al Dr. James O'Donoghue por la ayuda en ciencia planetaria

M√∫sica tambi√©n de Artlist https://artlist.com "Children of Mystery"

Su podcast "The Joy of X" es maravilloso - por favor, esc√∫chalo y suscr√≠bete dondequiera que consigas tus podcasts: https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

El incre√≠ble interactivo de Luci√©rnagas de Nicky Case - https://ncase.me/fireflies

El gran modelo interactivo de Kuramoto - https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle/

Strogatz, S. H. (2012). Sync: How order emerges from chaos in the universe, nature, and daily life. Hachette UK. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Sync‚Äã

Strogatz, S. H. (2000). From Kuramoto to Crawford: exploring the onset of synchronization in populations of coupled oscillators. Physica D: Nonlinear Phenomena, 143(1-4), 1-20. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Strogatz2000‚Äã

The Broughton Suspension Bridge and the Resonance Disaster ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Broughton‚Äã

Bennett, M., Schatz, M. F., Rockwood, H., & Wiesenfeld, K. (2002). Huygens's clocks. Proceedings of the Royal Society of London. Series A: Mathematical, Physical and Engineering Sciences, 458(2019), 563-579. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Bennett2002‚Äã

Pantaleone, J. (2002). Synchronization of metronomes. American Journal of Physics, 70(10), 992-1000. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Pantaleone2002‚Äã

Zhabotinsky, A. M. (2007). Belousov-zhabotinsky reaction. Scholarpedia, 2(9), 1435. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Zhabotinsky2007‚Äã

Flavio H Fenton et al. (2008) Cardiac arrhythmia. Scholarpedia, 3(7):1665. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Cardiac‚Äã

Cherry, E. M., & Fenton, F. H. (2008). Visualization of spiral and scroll waves in simulated and experimental cardiac tissue. New Journal of Physics, 10(12), 125016. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Cherry2008‚Äã

Tyson, J. J. (1994). What everyone should know about the Belousov-Zhabotinsky reaction. In Frontiers in mathematical biology (pp. 569-587). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. ‚Äî https://ve42.co/Tyson1994‚Äã

snippet.title: Prince Harry and William Walk Together as Royal Family Departs Prince Philip's Funeral
snippet.description:
'Prince Harry and William Walk Together as Royal Family Departs Prince Philip's Funeral'

Prince William and his brother, Prince Harry, were seen walking together through the grounds of Windsor Castle following the funeral of their grandfather, Prince Philip, the Duke of Edinburgh, on Saturday.

Lyrics:
Uooo, Uooo, mmm,

Que tan loco ser√≠a si yo fuera el due√±o de tu coraz√≥n por solo un d√≠a,
Si nos gana la alegr√≠a, yo por fin te besar√≠a,
¬øQu√© pasar√≠a?, podr√≠as ver entre √©l y yo quien ganar√≠a,

Mi condici√≥n, enamorado locamente de una chica que hoy extra√±o,
Y el no tenerte me hace da√±o,
Ser√≠amos la pareja del a√±o, cuanto te extra√±o,
Sin condici√≥n, me enamor√© precisamente de una chica que no es m√≠a,
Y mis amigos lo sab√≠an,
Y a mi todo el mundo me dec√≠a, que pasar√≠a, me dejar√≠as,

Si me dieran solo 24 horas yo la aprovecho,
Juro que yo voy a hacerte cosas que nunca te han hecho
Ya yo me cans√© de ser amigo con derechos, yo tal vez no te merezco 
Pero no hay ni que decirlo, si nos juntamos ser√≠amos la pareja del siglo 
Ponme ya a capella me da con introducirlo, navaja doble filo,
Cortamos y los videos me dio con reproducirlo 

Me lo dec√≠an, yo los ignoraba
Simplemente todo, ahora quedo en la nada
Se lo hac√≠a all√°, los ojos la miraban, 
Yo nunca cre√≠a que el amor cegaba

Puede ser que me destruya la mente, detente,
Como dice la canci√≥n que no meten preso a nadie por robarse un coraz√≥n,
Sufriendo y llorando de pena,
Que no, ya mi llanto no vale la pena, 
Yo no tengo alas, pero tu si vuelas, 
Se vuelve la mala de nuestra novela,

A mediados de enero, en un viaje de vacaciones estaban Marita, Tomito y Pablito componiendo Perrito Malvado, el cual no estaba terminado porque algo le faltaba,‚ÄØentr√≥ al ruedo L-Gante‚ÄØaportando su arte y‚ÄØ como fruto de esta fusi√≥n se cre√≥ esta s√∫per canci√≥n.

Perrito Malvado 
El perrito se fue de casa 
en pleno brillar de la luna 
por que hab√≠a una perra alzada 
que quer√≠a que pinte alguna 
APD 
perrito malvado 
agarras caravana
volves re mamado 
El perrito se fue de casa
en pleno brillar de la luna 
por que hab√≠a una perra alzada 
que quer√≠a que pinte alguna
Lo vieron darse la fuga por las v√≠as
se notaba que arrancaba ya la gira
las calles del barrio ya lo conoc√≠an 
se sabia que ma√±ana no volv√≠a
Mi perrito malvado
ay no seas as√≠
Te suelto la correa 
y te me queres ir 
Y si me sueltan la correa 
yo arranco pa la perrera 
donde est√°n todas las perras 
que mas mueven su cadera
este ritmo suavecito para que baile despacito 
yo me tiro este pasito
mientras enrolo ese fasito
Meta cumbia pisando barro
todas las negra moviendo el tarro
puro traqueteo pistolero
vos sabes que soy cumbiero 
siempre al ritmo ATR KeloKe

snippet.title: Gerard Piqu√© vuelve a hacerse con su m√°s preciado talism√°n tras la victoria: ¬°La red de la porter√≠a!
snippet.description:

en.title: Cape Horn, the most dangerous sea passage on Earth
en.description:
Cape Horn is in the extreme south of America. It is estimated that there were about 800 shipwrecks there and that 10,000 people lost their lives while trying to unite the Pacific and Atlantic oceans.

In this video we propose to discover why it is a unique place. We will also know some surprising peculiarities of the indigenous people who inhabited the area.

Thanks @Sir Chandler for participating! We invite you to know his channel.

 "To Begin Again"

When the world was ending
I‚Äôd hold you in my arms
And we talked about the places we‚Äôd never been
When the world was ending
We‚Äôd hold on to the past
Because it‚Äôs all we thought that we would ever see
But then the sun came right back
And the birds sang as if nothing had happened
 
And, it‚Äôs alright
It‚Äôs ok
We will get
Another day
To begin again, to begin again, to begin again
I don‚Äôt know how
I don‚Äôt know why
But I know that I will try
To begin again, to begin again, to begin
To live and love and breathe again
 
When the world was ending
We looked up at the sky
And we talked about the last song that we‚Äôd play
So far from comprehending
They‚Äôd lift us to the stars
Never seen each other from so far away
But then the sun came right back
And the kids played as if nothing had happened
 
And, it‚Äôs alright
It‚Äôs ok
We will get
Another day
To begin again, to begin again, to begin again

I don‚Äôt know why
But I know that I will try
To begin again, to begin again, to begin
To live and love and breathe again
 
And cry because I‚Äôm happy
And hold my friends like long lost lovers
Be kind to me and love each other
The world keeps spinning on
 
It‚Äôs alright
It‚Äôs ok
We will get another day
I don‚Äôt know how
I don‚Äôt know when
But I do know that we can
Try to begin again, to begin again

snippet.title: El funeral del pr√≠ncipe Felipe y el lugar d√≥nde permanecer√°n sus restos mortales | ¬°HOLA! TV
snippet.description:
Windsor se prepara para el funeral del duque de Edimburgo el pr√≥ximo 17 de abril en la capilla de San Jorge a la que asistir√°n solo 30 personas. No ser√° un funeral de estado, una petici√≥n hecha por el mismo duque pero la ceremonia s√≠ ser√° retransmitida por la televisi√≥n. La casa real intenta evitar aglomeraciones de gente por la pandemia y se ha pedido a los ciudadanos que no se congreguen en las residencias reales, sin embargo, la gente no ha podido resistirse a dejar flores y notas de condolencias para familia. Los restos mortales del duque ser√°n trasladados a una b√≥veda donde se conservar√°n hasta que fallezca su esposa la reina Isabel II y luego ser enterrados juntos a la capilla conmemorativa del rey Jorge VI.

snippet.description:

This fifteen minute special brings fans directly into Justin‚Äôs world and opens the doors to his powerful new album.

snippet.description:
"ANCIENT DREAMS IN A MODERN LAND". AVAILABLE JUNE 11TH.
PRE-ORDER/ PRE-SAVE: https://marina.lnk.to/ADIAMLID

"PURGE THE POISON" Available Now. https://marina.lnk.to/PurgeThePoisonID

Text 323.433.6663 to join the sisterhood. https://www.allmyfriendsarewitches.com/

Directed by: Weird Life Films @weirdlifefilms
Concept by: MARINA & Weird Life Films
Executive Producers: Laura Gordon, Ryan Ohm, & Jackson James
Video Commissioner: Trevor Joseph Newton
Produced by: Erin Boyle & Anthony Pedone

Gaffer: Paul Deorio

Hair Stylist: Rena Calhoun

Custom Wardrobe Designed by: Oscar Lima
Edit & Color: Ryan Ohm

PA: Matt Garland

Subscribe to the MARINA YouTube Channel - https://Marina.lnk.to/subscribeID‚Äã

https://www.marinaofficial.co.uk/

https://www.facebook.com/marinadiamandis‚Äã
https://marina.lnk.to/spotify‚Äã 
https://marina.lnk.to/applemusic‚Äã
https://soundcloud.com/marinadiamandis

#MARINA #PurgeThePoison #OfficialMusicVideo #AncientDreamsInAModernLand

LYRICS
All my friends are witches
And we live in Hollywood
Mystical bitches
Making our own sisterhood
Whilst society is falling
We are quietly reforming
Protecting the planet
Healing our own damage

Quarantined, all alone
Mother nature on the phone
What have you been doing?
Don‚Äôt forget, I am your home
Virus come, fires burn
Until human beings learn
From every disaster
You are not my master

Need to purge the poison
Show us our humanity
All the bad and good
Racism and misogyny
Nothing‚Äôs hidden anymore
Capitalism made us poor
God forgive America
For every single war

Need to purge the poison
From my system until
Human beings listen
Tell me, who‚Äôd you think are?
It‚Äôs your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won‚Äôt go far

2007, when size zero was the rage
Britney shaved her head and all we did was call her crazed
Harvey Weinstein‚Äôs gone to jail, #metoo helped us to unveil
Truth and all its glory
The ending of a story

It‚Äôs a New World Order
Everything just falls away
Our life as we knew it
Now belongs to yesterday
Inside all the love and the hate
We can all regenerate
Stop how we been living
Every single day

Need to purge the poison
From my system until
Human beings listen
Tell me, who‚Äôd you think are?
It‚Äôs your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won‚Äôt go far

I just want a world where I can see the feminine
We only make up one quarter of the government
Like an angel gone to hell
Cast the moon under our spell
Owning our power
Taking back what‚Äôs ours

Earth is like a white rose
Quiet cloud of petals cold
A place so corrupt where Angel‚Äôs flesh and blood is sold
The feminine is born as new
Studded with a diamond dew
Saw the dawn was coming
Everybody knew

Need to purge the poison
From my system until Human beings listen
Tell me, who‚Äôd you think are?
It‚Äôs your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won‚Äôt go far

Need to purge the poison
From my system until Human beings listen
Tell me, who‚Äôd you think are?
It‚Äôs your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won‚Äôt go far

snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite
